trans-unit.source: Could not determine the AppHost project path.
trans-unit.target: Could not determine the AppHost project path.

trans-unit.source: Could not inspect the AppHost project to verify persistent resource cleanup compatibility. Persistent resource cleanup will still be attempted.
trans-unit.target: Could not inspect the AppHost project to verify persistent resource cleanup compatibility. Persistent resource cleanup will still be attempted.

trans-unit.source: Failed to clean up persistent resources for {0}. {1}
trans-unit.target: Failed to clean up persistent resources for {0}. {1}

trans-unit.source: Could not find the DCP executable needed to clean up persistent resources.
trans-unit.target: Could not find the DCP executable needed to clean up persistent resources.

trans-unit.source: This AppHost uses Aspire.Hosting {0}, which might not support persistent resource cleanup. Persistent resource cleanup requires Aspire.Hosting {1} or later, or an AppHost configured to use the Aspire CLI bundle. Persistent resource cleanup will still be attempted.
trans-unit.target: This AppHost uses Aspire.Hosting {0}, which might not support persistent resource cleanup. Persistent resource cleanup requires Aspire.Hosting {1} or later, or an AppHost configured to use the Aspire CLI bundle. Persistent resource cleanup will still be attempted.

trans-unit.source: Stop the AppHost and clean up its persistent resources
trans-unit.target: Stop the AppHost and clean up its persistent resources

trans-unit.source: Multiple AppHosts are running. Use {0} to specify which one to stop, or use {1} to stop all of them.
trans-unit.target: Multiple AppHosts are running. Use {0} to specify which one to stop, or use {1} to stop all of them.

trans-unit.source: Multiple AppHosts are running. Use --apphost to specify which one to stop, or select one:
trans-unit.target: Birden çok AppHost çalışıyor. Durdurulacak AppHost'u belirtmek için --apphost komutunu kullanın veya birini seçin:

trans-unit.source: The path to the Aspire AppHost project file or a directory to search
The {0} and {1} options cannot be used together.
